dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9076 IH: Postal Data Privacy Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Scanlon (for herself, Mr. Johnson of Georgia, Mr. McGovern, Ms. Norton, and Ms. Jacobs) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To require a court order for use of a mail cover.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Postal Data Privacy Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Chapter 83 of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting after section 1737 the following:

section.header: Limitation on use of mail covers

paragraph.text: A governmental entity may not use a mail cover, unless the governmental entity obtains a court order pursuant to paragraph (2).

A court order authorizing the use of a mail cover may be issued by any court that is a court of competent jurisdiction and shall issue only if a governmental entity offers specific and articulable facts showing that there are reasonable grounds to believe that mail covers are relevant and material to an ongoing criminal investigation. In the case of a State governmental authority, such a court order shall not issue if prohibited by the law of such State.

The Chief Postal Inspector, upon the request of a governmental entity, shall take all necessary steps to preserve records and other evidence in its possession pending the issuance of a court order or other process.
Records referred to in paragraph (1) shall be retained for a period of 90 days, which shall be extended for an additional 90-day period upon a renewed request by the governmental entity.

subsection.text: The term mail cover has the meaning given that term in section 233.3 of title 39, Code of Federal Regulations (or any successor regulation).
The table of sections for chapter 83 of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting after the item related to section 1737 the following:

toc.toc-entry: 1738. Limitation on use of mail covers.
